'''The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale''' is a series of articles containing scenarios for use with the [[Star Wars Miniatures|''Star Wars'' Miniatures]] game, written by [[Jason Fry]]. It expands upon the history of [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]], a character from the [[Marvel Comics]] series. The articles were published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website between [[December 2]], [[2004]] and [[January 27]], [[2005]].
